allow: Bash(uv add asyncpg fastapi uvicorn uvloop msgspec orjson structlog redis httpx pydantic-settings alembic sqlalchemy)
Bash(uv add --dev pytest pytest-asyncio pytest-cov ruff mypy testcontainers pre-commit)
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.infrastructure.db import create_asyncpg_pool, create_sa_engine; print\(''db.py imports OK''\)")

Bash(uv run python -c "from src.domain.repositories import CallRepository, TurnRepository, AgentGenerationRepository, VoiceGenerationRepository, ToolExecutionRepository; print\(''Repository protocols import OK''\)")

Bash(uv run python -c "from src.infrastructure.repositories import PgCallRepository, PgTurnRepository, PgAgentGenerationRepository, PgVoiceGenerationRepository, PgToolExecutionRepository; print\(''All Pg repositories import OK''\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.infrastructure.redis_client import create_redis_pool, TTLSet, TTLMap; print\(''redis_client imports OK''\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.infrastructure.session_registry import RedisSessionRegistry; print\(''session_registry imports OK''\)")

Bash(uv run python -c "from src.routing.registry import load_registry; r = load_registry\(''router_registry/v1''\); print\(f''Version: {r.thresholds.version}''\); print\(f''Route A locales: {list\(r.route_a_examples.keys\(\)\)}''\); print\(f''Lexicon langs: {list\(r.lexicon_disallowed.keys\(\)\)}''\); print\(f''Short utt langs: {list\(r.short_utterances.keys\(\)\)}''\)")

Bash(uv run python -c "from src.routing.router import Router, RoutingResult; from src.routing.lexicon import check_lexicon, check_short_utterance; from src.routing.llm_fallback import LLMFallbackClient; print\(''All routing modules import OK''\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.voice_runtime.coordinator import Coordinator; print\(''OK''\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.api.app import create_app; print\(''app OK''\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.api.routes.health import router; print\(''health OK''\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.api.routes.admin import router; print\(''admin OK''\)")
Bash(uv add opentelemetry-api opentelemetry-sdk opentelemetry-exporter-otlp-proto-grpc sentry-sdk)
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.infrastructure.telemetry import setup_telemetry, setup_sentry, get_tracer, BARGE_IN_TOTAL; print\(''telemetry OK''\)")
